name: Arabinoxylan
summary: Decision-ready summary: Arabinoxylan is best framed for prebiotic fiber support; glycemic response; gut microbiome; safety screen: IBS/FODMAP sensitivity; severe bloating.
description: Arabinoxylan supports fiber; gut; glucose with moderate confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v8.2: A geriatric RCT reported enhanced NK cell activity with arabinoxylan rice bran.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: A geriatric RCT reported enhanced NK cell activity with arabinoxylan rice bran.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: rice-bran arabinoxylan product dosing varies; use product-specific clinical dose
